correction_lane: W17 Claude Science independent citation-correction (SEPARATE citation-verifier lane; read-only, provenance-only). Applies the SOURCE_VALIDATION_RULE outcome for the 3 audit-flagged pairs + the FOXP3 nested-label correction. No panel/gene/score/selectability/scorer/threshold/UI change.

human_primary_support.source_title: T-bet and GATA3 orchestrate Th1 and Th2 differentiation through lineage-specific targeting of distal regulatory elements.
human_primary_support.exact_locator: Kanhere et al. 2012 (Nat Commun): T-bet ChIP-seq in primary human Th1 cells differentiated in vitro from naive CD4+ precursors; T-bet binds distal sites at TBX21 and directly activates its own expression (Results, Fig. 5, Discussion; Methods 'Naive human CD4+ T cells were isolated and polarized').
human_primary_support.verification_reason: W17 independent citation-verifier: PMID/DOI/PMCID/title/authors resolve against PubMed + PMC; MeSH indexes Humans AND CD4-Positive T-Lymphocytes; direct human primary CD4 source for TBX21->Th1.

human_primary_support.source_title: Differential expression of chemokine receptors and chemotactic responsiveness of type 1 T helper cells (Th1s) and Th2s.
human_primary_support.exact_locator: Bonecchi et al. 1998 (J Exp Med): human CD4+ T-cell clones able to produce IFN-gamma but not IL-4 categorized as Th1 clones (Results, single-cell cytokine analysis); 'Th1s secrete IFN-gamma' (Introduction). Same human source already cited in the registry for th1_like.CXCR3.
human_primary_support.verification_reason: W17 independent citation-verifier: PMID/DOI/PMCID/title/authors resolve against PubMed + PMC; MeSH indexes Humans; text defines human CD4 Th1 clones by IFN-gamma production. Direct human primary CD4 source for IFNG->Th1.

human_primary_support.source_title: RORgammat and RORalpha signature genes in human Th17 cells.
human_primary_support.exact_locator: Castro et al. 2017 (PLoS ONE): IL-17F is one of 12 RORgammat-dependent Th17 signature genes reduced by RORgammat siRNA / inverse-agonist treatment in purified primary human CD4 T cells (Results, Fig 5A; Methods 'Human CD4 T cell purification' from two healthy donors, 'Th17 assay'). Authoritative DOI is the PLoS ONE 10.1371/journal.pone.0181868, NOT the spurious reference-list DOI.
human_primary_support.verification_reason: W17 independent citation-verifier: article-own PubmedData ArticleIdList + ELocationID confirm PLoS ONE DOI 10.1371/journal.pone.0181868, PMC5538713, title, Humans MeSH; direct human primary CD4 source for IL17F->Th17. A spurious reference-list Sci Transl Med DOI (10.1126/scitranslmed.3001107) was explicitly rejected.

treg_like.FOXP3.verification_reason: W17 independent citation-verifier: Wang et al. 2007 (PMID 17154262) re-resolved; PMID/DOI/title/authors match; species=Humans, CD4-Positive T-Lymphocytes; it is a PRIMARY research article providing DIRECT human CD4 counterevidence (activation induces transient FOXP3 in nonregulatory human CD4 cells), so the nested support_level is direct_primary_human_counterevidence, not corroborating_secondary_human.
